title: cymbopogon prolixus
intro: Cymbopogon prolixus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a tropical grass native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Cymbopogon prolixus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as citral and geraniol. The health benefits of Cymbopogon prolixus include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cymbopogon prolixus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
